effective_gradient_steps_formula: T_eff = local_steps * (n_samples / minibatch_size) when use_minibatch; else T_eff = local_steps

methods.passive_mb: Neutral bias probes with TANGO-MB scaling
methods.storm: Stacked terminal moment system with same T_eff; optional ridge (0 default)
methods.tango_mb: Minibatch moment scaling: divide terminal deltas by T_eff=T*(N/B) before TANGO inversion (w0 linearization)

observed: terminal client model deltas per round
public optimizer hyperparameters (lr, local_steps, batch_size, n)

phase2_goal: Fix TANGO under minibatch SGD; beat passive on minibatch_sgd prototype MSE

theorem_scope.minibatch_corrected: TANGO-MB/STORM: first-order terminal model with effective gradient steps T*(N/B) under w0≈0 and one full client pass per local step
residual_approximation: weight drift within multi-minibatch local steps

threat_model: active terminal probing; hyperparameters public; no intermediate gradients
